title: Introduction
text:
I am a graduate student at Boston University pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics. I bring professional experience in data analytics and audit from my role at Citigroup, where I support reporting, regulatory requirements, and the development of business insights. My background combines strong business knowledge with technical data skills, enabling me to analyze complex information and translate it into clear, actionable insights that support informed decision-making.



Boston University
Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics
University at Albany
Bachelor of Science in Business Administration (Concentration Marketing)
Minor in Chinese and Economics

Outside of my academic and professional work, I enjoy a variety of hobbies that help me stay balanced and creative. I spend time swimming, which allows me to stay active and clear my mind, and journaling, which helps me reflect and stay organized. I also enjoy exploring new restaurants, as it gives me the chance to experience different cuisines and environments. In addition, I like baking, which combines creativity and precision while allowing me to share something enjoyable with others.

title: Home
text:
I currently work as a Business Analytics Senior Analyst at Citigroup, where I apply business analytics to support data reporting, audit processes, and the generation of actionable insights for decision-making. I am also currently pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University, where I am strengthening my skills in data analysis, visualization, and data-driven strategy to better translate complex data into meaningful business outcomes.




I analyze large datasets to support both business operations and regulatory reporting requirements, ensuring that insights are accurate, timely, and aligned with organizational goals. I design and build interactive dashboards using visualization tools such as Tableau, enabling stakeholders to easily interpret data, monitor key metrics, and make informed decisions. In addition, I support audit processes by applying data analytics to identify trends, detect anomalies, and enhance transparency. Through this work, I help drive data-driven decision-making across the organization, translating complex data into clear and actionable insights.





Data Analytics & Visualization

Business Intelligence

Risk & Audit Analytics
